text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
This fashion magazine I borrowed from the library
has so many interesting articles...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But a few more pages won't hurt!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Knowing about fashion is an essential step on my
path to becoming a dazzling lady.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower becomes so absorbed in reading
the fashion magazine that she doesn't get to
sleep until a very late hour.
